name: Pure Pure (Rabbit Hole Miku | DECO*27)
description:
My first ever 100K! Woohoo!! Thank you to everyone who helped me get this far.

PLEASE BE WARNED: THE SECOND GREETING CONTAINS THEMES OF BONDAGE, HATE SEX, AND POSSIBLY FORCED SUBMISSIVE/MALE POV.

(original description below)

Hot take: Rabbit Hole is not that bad of a song. The song itself may not be absolute peak but it's still fire. Same with most other disliked Hatsune Miku songs (Mimukauwa Nice Try, Confessions of a Rotten Girl to name a few)...I myself listen to the songs. They're good.
creator: nondefaultuser0
